bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 27 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-17 · [research_task] Monitor SSE 4000 and ChiNext 3950 support

DONE

Monitor if SSE Composite holds 4000 and ChiNext holds 3950 gap floor on 2026-06-16 to confirm if the rally is a bull trap.

  • Outcome: research:SSE COMPOSITE, CHINEXT → completed | dir=sessions/8ace3c35-5e99-4709-b70c-f0cd75f9fa2c | summary: 研究对象: SSE COMPOSITE, CHINEXT | → 1 forecast(s) on SSE COMPOSITE, CHINEXT, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: SSE COMPOSITE, CHINEXT

2026-06-17 · [fact_correction] Resolve DXY index value inconsistency in 06_每日日报.md

DONE

A discrepancy exists between L71 (91.75) and L72 (99.81) for the DXY index within 06_每日日报.md.

  • Outcome: research:DXY → completed | dir=sessions/79153ec3-e1d4-4f1c-9e27-db57e6a651b8 | summary: 核心逻辑：DXY 的多头支撑来自美元在全球 FX 交易中的主导地位、美国通胀黏性、美国相对利差和 DX 期货交易生态；约束来自当前点位接近 52 周高点 100.64、欧元权重 57.60% 造成的单一方向集中，以及宏观叙事反转风险。[S1][S3][S4][S6][S9][S10] 因此，结论不是“买入一家公司”，而是对未来 3 至 6 个月美元利差、通胀和避险需求做战术性配置。[S1][S12][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on DXY, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: DXY

2026-06-16 · [research_task] 确认两融折算率监管文件

DONE · owner=policy-analyst · research discussion=确认两融折算率监管文件 (led by policy-analyst)

确认两融折算率 0.6 至 0.4 是否有正式监管文件、窗口指导或仅为市场压力测试，并判断是否可能分批执行。依据 5. 协作事项。

  • Outcome: research discussion "确认两融折算率监管文件" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告对极端去杠杆情景下的对冲策略进行压力测试。股指期货贴水扩大至-15%年化，期权隐波跳升至42%，导致4000万元预算下的期权保护名义从69.79亿元缩减至15.34亿元。若降低行权价至14% OTM则下跌初期完全暴露风险。1日99% VaR升至3.58%，低估1.032 pp。10%大跌下产生1.646%的NAV超额损耗。建议调整保费预算并动态平均建仓。 | → 15 forecast(s) on IF,600900.SH,601985.SH,HKEX,CCASS, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 15 (0 positions); tickers: IF, 600900.SH, 601985.SH, HKEX, CCASS, 688981.SH

2026-06-16 · [research_task] 查证两融折算率政策状态

DONE · owner=china-macro · research discussion=查证两融折算率政策状态 (led by china-macro)

查证两融折算率 0.6 至 0.4 的政策状态、执行窗口与 OMO/MLF 对冲可能性。依据 4. 下午行动．项 P1。

  • Outcome: research discussion "查证两融折算率政策状态" → completed | cards=10 | last--06-17审计认为，prior research notes关于DC-ABS政策风险溢价上行的方向正确，但“2027抵免回收自动触发主流主信托违约链”的强结论不成立。Abbott指令与OBBBA FIE/PFE规则主要通过ERCOT成本、税收抵免回收、再融资利差和储备补救能力影响QTS/CyrusOne结构。高级A类12个月PD估计由0.4%-0.7%升至0.9%-1.8%，LGD由18%-28%升至24%-38%；次级/剩余/VFN PD可升至5.0%-9.0%，LGD升至45%-65%。 | → 10 forecast(s) on LGFV,NOI,QTS,DSCR,CREFC, 0 position(…

  • Forecasts: 10 (0 positions); tickers: LGFV, NOI, QTS, DSCR, CREFC, DC
